response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in web development, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. However, he lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only a brief 7-month stint with C/C++ in 2015. Furthermore, he does not have the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking, making him fundamentally misaligned with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous work at RIDE Capital, focusing on investment practices.
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to multiple languages and frameworks, including DLang, Java, Node.js, and TypeScript.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
No demonstrated experience developing applications on the Windows platform or using enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
Missing the required deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
